invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破87000（近期低点附近）或资金费率转为正且高于-0.005%（空头压力显著缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 87000 (near recent low) or funding rate turns positive and above -0.005% (short pressure significantly eases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.118（支撑位）或资金费率转为负且低于-0.005%（空头压力增加），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.118 (support) or funding rate turns negative and below -0.005% (short pressure increases).
